Package egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service

Class BoardMasterVO

java.lang.Object
egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.BoardMaster
egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.BoardMasterVO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class BoardMasterVO extends BoardMaster implements Serializable

1.0
